items.title: What can a ‚Äòblack box‚Äô tell us about a plane crash?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>It‚Äôs one of the most important pieces of forensic evidence following a plane crash: The so-called ‚Äúblack box.‚Äù There are actually two of these remarkably sturdy devices: the cockpit voice recorder and the flight data recorder. And they‚Äôre typically orange, not black. (AP video: Kendria LaFleur). Read more: https://bit.ly/3WHQlBz

items.title: Plane with 6 aboard crashes in Philadelphia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>A medical transport jet with a child patient and five others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball and setting several homes ablaze.</article>

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A medical transport jet slammed into a Philadelphia neighborhood about 30 seconds after taking off on Friday, erupting in a fireball and engulfing several homes in fire. Two people were on board, the Federal Aviation Administration said.

items.title: LIVE: A$AP Rocky 's accuser returns to the stand as assault trial resumes
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as a man who alleges A$AP Rocky fired a handgun at him in 2021 returns to the courthouse for more cross-examination after a difficult day on the stand.
The defense is expected to continue challenging the man, known as A$AP Relli, on the actual moment of the alleged shooting. Read more: https://bit.ly/4aHmaQL 

#asaprocky #trial #usa #news #live</article>
